linkedin_profile.headline: Groups and Events manager at the Mandrake
linkedin_profile.about: Experienced and passionate Multi-Site Sales and Events Manager with 13 years of proven success in the hospitality industry. I thrive on the dynamic nature of the job and am always eager to explore new trends and opportunities to enhance customer experiences and drive business growth. With a strong track record of exceeding sales targets and executing memorable events across multiple locations, I bring a strategic mindset and a creative approach to every project. My dedication to delivering exceptional service, combined with my ability to adapt to changing market demands, makes me a valuable asset to any business and organisation. Recognised for adeptly assessing operational needs and implementing solutions to drive cost savings, revenue improvement, and enhance customer satisfaction. I'm resourceful and well-organised with a proven track record of leadership and team-building. Seeking a role where I can leverage my experience to continue a successful career trajectory. With a passion for business expansion, innovation, and success, I possess expertise in economic and business changes, sales and marketing strategy implementation, effective leadership, and a deep understanding of market and consumer needs. As a motivated individual, I am eager to contribute value to both small and large-scale event planning. I bring a keen attention to detail and the ability to meet challenges with critical thinking and adaptability. With a history of coordinating and executing successful events, I am prepared to help teams achieve company goals and drive client satisfaction.

experience.title: Trainee Supervisor
experience.description: Appointed to CRM Specialist.

experience.title: Supervisor CRM Specialist
experience.description: Started as Sales Consultant in 2015, promoted to Senior Sales in 2016, Trainee Supervisor in 2017 and further promoted to Supervisor by end of 2017. Key Achievements & Responsibilities: • In 2016 and 2017, contributed personal sales over £1M and was awarded the Dior Million Club. • Delivered a CRM action plan to senior management after completing the Dior Management Program. Commended by Management team for implementing innovative strategies to maximize CRM and sales. • Appointed to CRM Specialist; led all CRM activities and supported a team of 24 to meet all business objectives including CRM and Event KPI’s. • Worked alongside CRM and Marketing Manager to create local campaigns and events aimed at building and maintaining an active client database, and acquiring new prospects. • Reviewed feedback and conducted research on products and customer purchase behavior, increased sales by 11% due to the findings and made improvement on service and campaigns. • Increased data capture rate significantly by 12% in 2 months, by implementing incentives and designing training sessions and materials to support team on successful data capture.

experience.title: Assistant Department Manager
experience.description: Developed and led a sales team of 15, including 2 Supervisors and 3 CRM Specialists. Responsible for managing all aspects of the day-to-day operations within the department. This includes driving growth and retention through Sales, CRM, Marketing, Customer Service and Visual Merchandising. Key Achievements & Responsibilities: • Successfully restructured the department and stabilised the team as they were left without an AM for 6 months during which figures and team performance reduced significantly. • Finished the year with strong results, delivering a 17% uplift in sales vs. the same period LY through supportive leadership, team motivation and CRM strategies. • Designed and implemented a customer onboarding plan, using lead logs to monitor and convert prospects and leads. Successfully grew RTW’s client base by 21% in 2018. • Built a Pre-Launch strategy in store, specifically focusing on client experience, promoting new collections and driving deposits before the launch day. • Contributed to Dior’s New Saddle Bag Launch and Campaign - the biggest launch since store opening; executed animations and strategies that generated incredible store traffic with a 24% increase in sales.

experience.title: Retail Support Manager
experience.description: Responsible for managing the key aspects of the store's business, including Sales and Retail Marketing; covering CRM, product launches and in-house events. Key Achievements & Responsibilities: • Managed a team of 4; end-to-end planning and execution of local email campaigns, activations, and loyalty programs to increase retention, engagement and drive sales. • Oversaw a large database with 6 different segments - actively identified new segments to target and planned marketing activities accordingly. • Worked with Digital team to design and develop a CRM mobile application; implemented and streamlined functions, including dashboard, contact/outreach and data capture which improved the overall sales productivity and the data capture rate significantly from 80% to 94% in 3 months. • Effectively boosted sales by 15% and increased in-store appointments during a slow selling period through creating a store animation, visual concept and e-mail campaign. • Increased local engagement by redesigning the local activation plan (Gifting, Birthday and Welcome) and created guidelines and communication tools for store to implement. • Developed loyalty and engagement by creating exclusive and innovative in-house events, experience and animations. • Successfully planned and executed over 12 events with an average ROI of 25%, including Cruise 19 Trunk Show – over 300 clients invited, generated £240K on the day of the event and led the 3 months follow-up campaign which converted 35% into high-value sales. • Led Omni-Channel project end-to-end; created a Client Relations department that responded to digital inquiries and referred leads to sales teams, increasing conversion by 13%. Additionally reduced customer complaint by 11% by resolving all client issues.

experience.title: Assistant Financial Controller
experience.description: Responsible for team management and all related matters including monthly one to one meetings, half annual review and annual reviews. Also Goals and PDP implementation. - Directly responsible for external and internal audits - Turnover circa £24.2M for 258 Rooms - Implementing and maintaining Company Policies and Procedures; managing related internal communications and contractual changes. - Full and Complete balance sheet reconciliation. - P&L and cost trackers monitoring and follow ups - Payroll processing including cross charges between departments, redundancy and termination calculations as well as dealing with staff requests and queries. - Month end closure strictly on the 4th day of the month. Achievements - Successfully implemented a full restructure and re-organisation of the finance team, significantly improving the skills, knowledge and ability of the function and its interaction with the rest of the organisation. - Strategically managed improvements in cash flows and cash forecasting including funding negotiations with joint venture partners. - Staff retention by creating pleasant relaxed atmosphere yet professional and highly productive. - Improving the F&B cost control via implementation of tighter stock control measures and performing weekly spot checks. - Improved cash handling via the introduction of an advanced automated cash deposit machine to reduce and minimize work load and errors. - Introduction of un updated surveillance system which significantly reduced violence and theft related issues.

experience.title: Director of Brand, Culture & Communications
experience.description: Reporting directly to the General Manager and Owner-Operator of the hotel, managing three members of staff. COMMUNICATIONS/MARKETING • Developing and implementing an overall marketing strategy for the hotel & F&B outlets • Directing the film and photography shoots for marketing purposes • Marketing through ‘The Mandrake Eye’, the quarterly newspaper • Creating sales & marketing packages to sell spaces and create awareness around The Mandrake's offering • Creating ads for digital marketing campaigns BRANDING • Developing and implementing the brand story, concept & guidelines • Training, developing and coaching brand management to employees to reach brand objectives and deliverables • Designing and generating marketing collateral, such as umbrellas, coasters, pens, pencils, tote bags, caps and fans • Development and design of The Mandrake Eye, the hotel’s quarterly newspaper CULTURAL PROGRAMMING • The curation and implementation of the Spiritual wellbeing and Artist in Residence programme, generating marketing exposure and guest incentives for travellers. WEBSITE • Developed and managed website, pages, content, and materials to ensure The Mandrake brand is effectively promoted to the defined target audiences. • Updating the website with AiR, Wellbeing, special offers, improving efficiency of site, troubleshooting, improving SEO PR • Managing all Travel, F&B, wellness & lifestyle PR for the hotel SOCIAL MEDIA • Curating and implementing a social media strategy • Increased social media followers by 220% within 6 months

activity_themes: Hospitality and hotel industry developments in London
Lifestyle brand launches and wellness concepts
Cultural events, performances and artist residencies
Impact of remote working on city centre businesses
Career opportunities in asset management and compliance
